The Real Problem

The Real Cost of
Being Invisible After
First Contact

You’re not losing deals because you’re not good at what you do. You’re losing them because you’re losing contact — literally. Here’s what’s actually happening:

01
They Meet 15 Professionals. They Remember 2.
You shake hands, exchange cards, have real chemistry. But within hours, they meet 14 others. Your face becomes a blur. That card? A pile on their desk. Your name is saved, but you’re not memorable. You’re just another card.
02
Your Contact Info Isn’t Worth Remembering. Yet.
Your number is archived in their contacts, buried below people they actually think about. When they’re ready to buy, they don’t dig. They ask for a recommendation. Someone else is top of mind. Not you.
03
You’re Waiting. They’re Forgetting.
Every day that passes, you’re hoping they remember. They’re not. A buried contact doesn’t win deals—it loses them. By the time they’re ready, they’ve already decided. And it isn’t you.
Get Yours Now →
How It Works

One tap.
On their phone forever.

No app downloads. No QR codes. No typing. Just tap — and you’re installed on their phone as a personalized app icon they can open any time.

01
Tap Their Phone
Hold your AirConnect card near any iPhone or Android. NFC triggers instantly — no app, no scan, no setup on their end. It just works.
02
Your Profile Opens Instantly
Your full digital profile — name, photo, contact, links, Calendly, GCash QR — loads in their browser in under 2 seconds. Beautiful, complete, and yours.
03
You Live on Their Phone
They tap “Add to Home Screen” — and your personalized app icon, with your name and branding, is saved permanently. Every time they open their phone, you’re there. No paper card does that.
Get Yours Now →

Not just a card.
A presence on
their phone.

AirConnect turns every handshake into a permanent digital footprint. You don’t just get saved in their contacts — you get a dedicated icon on their home screen. Your brand, on demand, forever.

Instant Profile Delivery
One tap and your complete digital profile is in their hands — no fumbling, no typing, no missed connections.

Update your profile anytime from the app. The icon on their home screen always opens your latest information — no reprints, ever.

Customize your app icon name and profile. LinkedIn, Calendly, GCash QR, website — everything in one branded experience on their screen.

Works on Every Phone
iPhones from 2018 and all NFC-enabled Android phones. Zero downloads on their end. Works anywhere in the world.

FAQ

Everything
you want to
know.

We know the card is new to you. Here are the most common questions from professionals before they made the switch.

Still have questions
AirConnect is a premium NFC-enabled business card with a tiny chip inside — the same technology as contactless payments. Tap it against any phone and your digital profile opens instantly. But here’s what sets it apart: the person you tapped can add your personalized app icon directly to their home screen. Your name, your branding — one tap away on their phone, permanently. No app download. No QR scan. No typing required.
No app needed on their end — ever. Your profile opens directly in their phone's browser, just like tapping a link. It works on all iPhones (iPhone 7 and newer, iOS 13+) and virtually all Android phones made after 2016. If their phone doesn't support NFC for any reason, your card also comes with a QR code fallback so you're never left without a solution.
This is one of the biggest advantages. Your physical card never changes — and neither does the app icon on their phone. But what the icon opens always reflects your latest profile. Changed your number? New title? New company? Update it in the app in minutes. Every person who ever tapped your card will see your current information the next time they open your icon. No reprints. No chasing people to re-save your number.
No subscription. No monthly fees. No hidden charges. You pay once for your AirConnect card and it's yours forever. Profile updates, link changes, and tap analytics are all included. The only time you'd need to spend again is if you physically lose or damage the card — which is covered under our replacement policy.
Let's put ₱3,000 in perspective. A custom website? ₱50,000 to ₱500,000+ — and that's before the monthly maintenance, hosting, and developer retainers. A mobile app that lets people tap and save your contact info? ₱500,000 to ₱5,000,000+ — and you'll wait 6 to 18 months to launch. That's assuming it even works on every phone, every time.

AirConnect does all of that — for ₱3,000. Once. Forever. No subscriptions. No developer bills. No waiting. One tap, and your contact is saved on their phone. Compare ₱3,000 to the cost of losing one client, one deal, one opportunity because they couldn't find your number. You're not buying a card. You're buying the system that closes deals for you while you sleep.
On iPhones, NFC for reading tags is always on — no settings needed. On Android, NFC is on by default on most devices. In the rare case it's off, the QR Code is accessible on their digital business card page and can also be downloaded. You're covered either way. We designed AirConnect so there is no scenario where you're stuck.
You can add virtually anything: name, title, company, phone, email, website, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Calendly booking link, GCash QR, bio, and photo. You also set your app icon’s display name — what shows under the icon on their home screen. Pro plan supports unlimited links and multiple profile versions so you can switch between a corporate and a personal brand profile anytime.
We ship nationwide across the Philippines via our courier partners. Metro Manila orders typically arrive in 2–4 business days. Provincial orders take 4–7 business days. Your AirConnect card comes in a premium matte black gift box — it's unboxing-worthy. Perfect if you're gifting it to a colleague or team. Express shipping is available at checkout.
Your data is completely in your control. The NFC chip only stores a link to your profile — not your personal data directly on the card. You choose what appears on your profile and can update or hide information anytime. As for passive scanning: NFC requires very close proximity (under 4cm) and an active tap gesture — no one can scan your card from across the room or in your pocket.
Perksmania is a House of Rewards app. It's a rewards app where you get perks, discounts, and exclusive deals from partner businesses.

Why is AirConnect powered by Perksmania? Because every connection you make can now have value.

With AirConnect + Perksmania: You don't just share your contact—you give people instant access to rewards and offers.

What this means for you:
If you're a user → you enjoy deals and perks
If you're a business → you can become a partner and attract more customers through rewards

Simple: AirConnect connects people. Perksmania gives them a reason to engage.
Yes — and team orders get significant discounts. We offer bulk ordering starting at 10 cards with custom branding options (your company logo on the card design), a team management dashboard to oversee all profiles, and a dedicated account manager. Several insurance agencies, real estate firms, and sales organizations across the Philippines have already onboarded their entire teams. Contact us for a custom quote.
